content:
Overview A comprehensive Django-based web application for managing silk product inventory, featuring role-based access control, REST API integration, and a responsive user interface.
Key Features ✅ Role-based access control system for multi-user management ✅ REST APIs built with Django REST Framework ✅ Authentication system with JWT for secure access ✅ Advanced search and filtering capabilities ✅ Email notification system for inventory alerts ✅ Responsive design across all device sizes ✅ Complete CRUD operations for inventory management Tech Stack Component Technology Backend Python, Django API Django REST Framework Database SQLite3 Frontend HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript Auth JWT Authentication Links 🔗 GitHub: Rajshahi-Silk-Products-Management-Web-Application
summary: A comprehensive web application for managing silk product inventory with role-based access control, REST APIs, authentication, search, notifications, and responsive UI.
title: Rajshahi Silk Products Management System

content:
Overview An AI-powered system for real-time analysis of fundus images to detect diabetic retinopathy at various severity levels using advanced deep learning techniques.
Key Features 🧠 Ensemble CNN models with CBAM (Convolutional Block Attention Module) attention mechanism 🔬 Binary and multi-class classification of DR severity levels ⚡ Real-time image processing and analysis pipeline 🌐 Django web application for accessible, real-time prediction 📊 Detailed severity classification and reporting Tech Stack Component Technology Deep Learning TensorFlow, CNN, CBAM Backend Python, Django Image Processing OpenCV Frontend HTML, CSS Links 🔗 GitHub: Automated-Diabetic-Retinopathy-Detection
summary: An AI-powered system for detecting diabetic retinopathy from fundus images using ensemble CNNs with CBAM attention mechanism, integrated into a Django web application for real-time prediction.
title: Automated Diabetic Retinopathy Detection

Who I Am I’m a Junior Software Engineer at TechnoNext Software Ltd., working in the R&D department on scalable web applications and microservices. I hold a B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering from Rajshahi University of Engineering & Technology (RUET).
My technical toolkit spans Python, Go, Ruby on Rails, Spring Boot, and Docker, and I bring strong foundations in data structures, algorithms, and full-stack development. I’m also an active competitive programmer with 800+ problems solved across platforms.
